posts.caption:
💙 Blue Rose lovers… this one’s for you.

This elegant Fenton Satin Blue Rose swung vase is the kind of piece that quietly steals the show. With its soft satin finish and delicate floral design, it’s timeless, charming, and ready for its next home.

And if you’re a collector, there’s more good news… 🌸 We also have the matching basket, candy jar, and bell from this beautiful Blue Rose collection available in the shop! Whether you’re completing your set or just beginning one, now’s the perfect time to bring these treasures together.

Which piece would you take home first? 💙

🍀 For those lucky enough to find it
🛍️ HiraethHaven.com
